privileged_info_summary: The task uses real NASA GISTEMP (Global Mean Estimates based on Land and Ocean Data) climate dataset from https://data.giss.nasa.gov/gistemp/graphs/graph_data/Global_Mean_Estimates_based_on_Land_and_Ocean_Data/graph.csv. The CSV file (global_temps.csv) contains three columns: Year, No_Smoothing, and Lowess(5), representing temperature anomalies. The task is set up in project directory /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/ClimateData with main class com.climate.ClimateAnalyzer. The project uses Maven build system with Java 17 and JUnit 5 for testing. A fallback synthetic CSV dataset is embedded in the setup script for cases where network download fails. The task validates the refactoring through both static code analysis (checking for getResourceAsStream usage and absence of hardcoded paths) and dynamic verification that moves the source resource file to ensure the code loads from classpath, not the filesystem.
